channel.title: Kubai Kevin
channel.description: Practical backend engineering, AI tooling, and developer career advice by Kubai Kevin — a software developer with 10+ years building production systems in fintech and AI.

item.title: 3 HTMX trade-offs nobody told you about
item.description: Cut frontend bundle size 90% and cold-start render time 40% with HTMX 2.0.0 — connection pooling, eviction policies, and the cache stampede mistake most teams make.

item.title: Why USSD still beats apps in Africa
item.description: Build a USSD fintech stack that survives 2026 traffic with Go 1.22, Redis 7.2, and 124 ms p99 latency — connection pooling, TTL eviction, and the operator timeout mistakes most teams make.

item.title: Micro-SaaS niches eaten by AI in 2026
item.description: Discover which micro-SaaS niches survived AI commoditization in 2026 — and which ones got absorbed by platforms. Learn from real systems, revenue data, and failure patterns. Avoid $50k mistakes upfront.

item.title: 40% AI code: maintain it without regret
item.description: Cut CI friction 40% when 40% of code is AI-generated — compare migration runners vs auditors with concrete costs, latency, and a 30-minute audit step.

item.title: Sell dev tools in the AI sales cycle
item.description: Cut dev tool sales cycle 92% with a 7-day Slack bot that posts vulnerability reports — no ROI spreadsheets, no pilots, no committees. How we went from 14-week cycles to 8 days in 2026.

item.title: Self-healing pipelines: AI agents vs brittle scripts
item.description: Cut incident response time 70% with self-healing pipelines — Argo Workflows vs CrewAI agents, with 3 concrete numbers and the mistake that cost $14,200.

item.title: 78% of AI codebases fail onboarding
item.description: Cut onboarding time 52% with AI code: the 3 metrics that decide whether Option A or B actually works in 2026

item.title: Lies your AI assistant tells itself
item.description: 98% drop in AI injection attacks with 8% latency cost — the regex, code, and metrics teams use to harden chatbots in 2026

item.title: Upgrade apps for 4G-as-baseline in 2026
item.description: Cut API p95 latency 66% under 5% packet loss — Vite 5.3, React Query 5.10, Redis 7.2 and Lambda@Edge optimizations for East-African 4G users.

item.title: 6 AI stacks that level the dev playing field in 2026
item.description: Cut dev time 42% with AI: GitHub Copilot Enterprise, Cursor IDE and the exact ROI numbers Nairobi teams reported in 2026

item.title: 10 AI wrappers that shipped in 2026 — 8 died fast
item.description: Cut LLM latency 57% and costs 24% with LlamaStack v1.3 — the only AI wrapper that survived 2026 without getting dropped

item.title: Consolidate Redis, Kafka, pgBouncer into Postgres 17
item.description: Replace Redis, Kafka, and pgBouncer with one Postgres 17 instance—benchmarks, cost savings, and the exact metrics to check tonight for a 64 % bill cut.

item.title: Hit $5k MRR without a marketing team
item.description: Hit $5k MRR on Shopify app — no ads, no team, just reliability and pricing that matters. Integration, churn, and referral tactics that paid off in 2026.

item.title: Tool-calling patterns: stable vs breakable under load
item.description: Cut Redis p99 latency 60% and 0% write failures at 2500 RPS — connection pooling, batching, and the socket leak mistake most teams make.

item.title: AWS costs for Nairobi SaaS: 2026 bill split
item.description: Break down a Nairobi SaaS AWS bill in 2026: compute, storage, and egress costs for 500 users, with concrete numbers and CDK scripts you can run today.

item.title: When flags become experiments
item.description: Cut experimentation costs 90% with feature flags that work offline. Compare 7 platforms for SMS, low-bandwidth, and $5/month budgets — benchmarks, code, and rollback tricks included.

item.title: IDPs in 2026: by team size, by pain
item.description: A 2026 survey by the Platform Engineering Guild found that 68% of teams reported their IDP slowed down new engineers in the first month — not because the…

item.title: LLMs' hidden OWASP pitfalls in 2026
item.description: Detect 95% of LLM prompt injection attacks with input validation, caching, and Redis 7.2 observability in 2026

item.title: AI hiring: what actually moves the bar
item.description: Cut first-round review time 65% with AI resume ranking and live coding scoring — pgvector, pytest 7.4, and sentences-transformers 2.3.1 bring hidden requirements to light.

item.title: AI observability: the metrics that matter
item.description: AI observability cuts false alerts 8× by tracking drift vectors and confidence histograms instead of just latency and errors. Learn the metrics that actually matter and how to instrument them in 2026.
